"'''In the Beginning'''" was a short comic in ''[[Star Wars Tales 11]]'' and was collected in ''[[Star Wars Tales Volume 3]]''. The story was written by [[Garth Ennis]], colors by [[Todd Broeker]] and letters by [[Steve Dutro]].

==Plot summary==
A young [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] loses [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|his ship]] to a [[Han Solo/Legends|young man]] and his [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] [[Chewbacca/Legends|companion]].
